detail.description: Jorge Barrosa singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Tommy White.
Jorge Barrosa doubles (11) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom.
Jorge Barrosa doubles (10) on a fly ball to center fielder Kyler Fedko.
Jorge Barrosa homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field. Adrian Del Castillo scores.
Jorge Barrosa singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kyle Tucker.
Jorge Barrosa singles on a line drive to left fielder Austin Slater. Ildemaro Vargas to 2nd.
Jorge Barrosa homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. Ketel Marte scores.
Jorge Barrosa doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Mauricio Dubón.
Jorge Barrosa doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr.
Jorge Barrosa doubles (7) on a line drive to right fielder Johnathan Rodríguez. Alek Thomas scores.
Jorge Barrosa doubles (6) on a line drive to shortstop Gunnar Henderson, deflected by left fielder Taylor Ward.
Jorge Barrosa singles on a line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Jorge Barrosa doubles (5) on a fly ball to right fielder Colton Cowser.
Jorge Barrosa triples (1) on a line drive to right fielder Brett Baty. Alek Thomas scores.
Jorge Barrosa doubles (4) on a fly ball to center fielder Luis Robert Jr. Ildemaro Vargas scores. Jose Fernandez scores. Tim Tawa to 3rd.
Jorge Barrosa singles on a ground ball to center fielder Justin Crawford.
Jorge Barrosa singles on a bunt ground ball to second baseman Bryson Stott.
Jorge Barrosa singles on a line drive to center fielder Andy Pages.
Jorge Barrosa doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Teoscar Hernández.
Jorge Barrosa doubles (9) on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Alex Bregman. Jose Fernandez scores. Tim Tawa to 3rd.
Jorge Barrosa doubles (8) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong.
Jorge Barrosa singles on a line drive to right fielder Owen Caissie.
